sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8317" key="a)neci/thlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεξ-ίτηλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">indelible,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βαφή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.44</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
